analysis_status: Post-review deterministic stress specified after a development pilot; not preregistered and not an untouched diagnostic experiment.
claim_boundary: Each constructed law is an exact member of a learned MOSAIC bridge class anchored to stored real token tables. The analysis demonstrates existence of harmful within-class drift; it does not estimate how often such drift occurs in deployment.
name: MOSAIC real-table-anchored admitted-shift stress v1
